title: dryopteris oppositipenna
intro: Dryopteris oppositipenna is a type of fern that belongs to the Dryopteridaceae family, commonly known as wood fern or autumn fern. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Dryopteris oppositipenna include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting the immune system. The herbal preparations of this plant include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
